final:
module sync_counter_with_load (
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (load) begin
            count <= d;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
